summary: Adequate recording of a well‑regarded show with no specific musical details noted
review: Both reviewers gave the release four stars and describe it as a terrific or great performance, but they provide virtually no information about the audio source or sound quality beyond calling it "adequate." The lack of detail suggests a listenable but unremarkable recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Two 4‑star reviews indicate a positive view of the show, yet only vague comments about the audio (‘adequate’) keep the overall rating modest.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers simply note the recording is ‘adequate’; no specifics on clarity, mix or source type are provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments; reviewers generally feel the show was good enough to merit a positive rating.
